title: Context injection: IDE-opened files, task notifications, compact boundary handling
description:
OC context.rs injects system reminders. CC also handles:
- IDE-opened file context (<ide_opened_file> tags)
- Task notifications (task-summary forks)
- Compact boundary messages (skip pre-boundary content on resume)
- File history snapshots (for tool-result resume)

## Scope
- src/context.rs additions for the above
- New context providers registered via trait
- Snapshot/restore for tool results across compact boundaries

## References
- /home/doll/claude-code/context/
- /home/doll/claude-code/utils/fileHistory.ts
